params.name: Book of Eibon
params.description: It is also known as the abyssal scriptures of dark wisdom, authored by the legendary archmage Eibon. This forbidden grimoire is crafted with a cover as dark as the abyss, shimmering with a gloomy brilliance like the condensed light of stardust. Its pages, soaked in the ink of Ancient Wood, bear the traces of long-forgotten myths and prohibited spells. The script within twists and entwines like a nightmare, each page engraved with the Mark of Chaotic Power, awakening terrors that slumber in the r …
